details: 18 allowed warnings (unmaintained gtk-rs, proc-macro-error, unic-*) — all pre-existing, unrelated to db.rs changes
Path injection: resolve_custom_path rejects '..' segments, HOME empty check returns Err, tilde expansion limited to single substitution
Error handling: all init functions return Result, create_dir_all errors propagated, no expect/panic in changed code
Scanned db.rs, events.rs, audit.rs, mod.rs, lib.rs — no hardcoded secrets, API keys, private keys, or credentials
api_key references in events.rs read from runtime config, not hardcoded
